caption: A news broadcast shows Nitish Kumar and other men standing behind a table crowded with microphones during a press conference. Nitish Kumar wears a blue button-down shirt and glasses, positioned centrally among men wearing waistcoats and traditional Indian attire. The scene remains static across the frames, with the men facing forward toward the cameras. The screen is heavily overlaid with red and yellow news graphics. The top banners vary; the first frame reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", while the second reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The bottom ticker scrolls text, with the first frame stating "नीतीश कुमार: PM की शुभकामनाओं के लिए आभार" and the second stating "नीतीश कुमार: PM के सहयोग के लिए ह". The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right. Sidebars feature small portraits of other officials, such as "संतोष सुमन" and "विजय चौधरी", and the time "10:07 PM" is displayed.
